MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OMRI BERGER MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP section 425.16, also known as the Anti SLAPP statute. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
